SANDOR CERTIFICATION
Week 1, Video Four: The Model And The “S”
www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 6 --

Stated Objective 	Assets 	Numbers
Diagnosis 	One-Step 	Review & Repeat
www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 6 --

Getting The Stated Objective
• Dan Sullivan Style: 	“If we were having this conversation 8 weeks from
today and we were looking back over the past 8 weeks, what would have
needed to happen in order for you to be happy with the results?”
• Frank Style: 	“I usually work with a client for eight weeks. During that eight
week period, we try to hit one big and important target. What’s your one
big and important target?”
• Alternate Frank Style: 	“OK. What’s our mission? What do you want to
accomplish together?”
www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 6 --

Their Common Responses
• Response 1: 	“More sales.”
• Response 2: 	“Well, let me tell you about what I’m doing”
• Response 3: 	“Excuse me while I vomit up all my problems on you and
totally ignore the question”
• IT IS VERY, VERY UNUSUAL AND RARE FOR THEM TO HAVE A
SPECIFIC ANSWER TO THE QUESTION.
www.getwsodo.com

-- 4 of 6 --

Digging
• 	Response 1: “More sales.”
• 	YOU: “Great. How much sales volume did you do over the past X weeks? How much would you like to do over the next X weeks?”
• 	Response 2: “Well, let me tell you about what I’m doing”
• 	YOU: “Great. So what would you like to accomplish together over the next X weeks? More sales? More leads? More revenue, or …?
(Leave the question open and let them answer.)
• 	Response 3: “Excuse me while I vomit up all my problems on you and totally ignore the question.”
• 	YOU: “Great. I know it sounds ridiculous but let’s pretend for a minute that all those problems just went away. With that in mind, what
would you like to accomplish together over the next X weeks? More sales? More leads? More revenue, or …?” (Leave the question open
and let them answer.)
• 	NO MATTER WHAT THE ANSWER IS, ALWAYS ESTABLISH A BASELINE AND A TARGET. THEN CONFIRM WITH ACTUAL NUMBERS.
• 	Establish Baseline Example: How much revenue did you do over the past X weeks. How much would you like to do over the next X
weeks?
• 	Confirm With Actual Numbers: “So if I’m hearing you right, you did $100K over the past X weeks. You’d like to do $150K over the next X
weeks. Therefore, our mission together is to bring in an additional $50K.”
www.getwsodo.com

-- 5 of 6 --

Stated Objective 	Assets 	Numbers
Diagnosis 	One-Step 	Review & Repeat
www.getwsodo.com

-- 6 of 6 --
